raw_consumer_statement:
I am filing a billing dispute regarding a Macys credit card charge for {$130.00} related to a returned item that was never credited to my account. 

On XX/XX/year>, I purchased a XXXX XXXX mens jacket at Macys XXXX XXXX for {$130.00}. Between XX/XX/XXXX and XX/XX/year>, I returned the jacket in person at the same store. 

At the time of the return, the Macys XXXX did not provide both the original purchase receipt and a proper return receipt. I was given only XXXX piece of paper and believed the return had been processed correctly. Later I discovered that no refund had been credited to my Macys credit card account. 

As a result, interest and charges accumulated and the balance increased to {$170.00}. 

I contacted XXXX XXXX multiple times and was instructed to report fraud. After investigation, XXXX confirmed that no fraud occurred. This issue is not fraud but a billing error because a returned item was not properly credited. 

There are also inconsistencies in Macys internal records and online statements regarding item descriptions and sizes for transactions during this period, suggesting possible system or documentation errors. 

I am requesting : A refund of {$130.00} Removal of all related interest and fees Confirmation that the account is corrected and the billing error resolved
